name: Liam
description: Night sky! 180 twinkling stars fill the darkness. Every second or two, a random rainbow lightning bolt cracks down from the top — jagged, glowing, screen-flashing. Totally safe. Totally awesome.

name: Bennet
description: A GIANT CUBE slowly marches in — 1000 HP, glowing 3-D body with a green-to-red health bar. The Maker now has RAPID FIRE (4x faster bullets, faster too)!

name: Afhok
description: Monsters shoot spinning fireballs! Every monster lobs a slow, glowing fireball toward you — rotating flame petals, hot white core, and an orange halo. Dodge them!

name: Ezra
description: A giant hammer smashes down every 5 seconds! Red crosshair warns you where it'll land. Each impact leaves a solid white block — the Maker can't walk through them. Up to 6 blocks accumulate!

name: Elle
description: Monsters now have big googly eyes with drifting pupils, wild pink spiky hair, and rosy cheeks. They randomly yell Italian Brainrot phrases in speech bubbles: Tralalero Tralala! Bombardino Coccodrillo! Cappuccino Assassino!

name: Bennet
description: We interrupt this game for a Safeway ad! Every 15 seconds a full Safeway advertisement appears for 3 seconds — four deals, the red logo, a SALE starburst, and fine print. SKIP AD (unavailable).

name: Akil and Jonah
description: Bullets are now flying swords — silver blade, gold crossguard with ruby gems, wrapped handle, and pommel. Enemy fireballs are now spinning basketballs — orange with black seams, specular highlight, and a shadow.

name: Ashok and Cyrus
description: 5 Nether portals scattered around the arena! Walk into one and you instantly warp to a random other portal — purple flash, 1.6s cooldown before you can warp again.

name: Lot of Kids
description: Swords now destroy basketballs mid-air! The giant cube is renamed QUESO. Breaking news ticker scrolls across the bottom: 'Soup is better than Peanut.'

name: Ezra and Ashok
description: Danger: each portal you enter gets a blinking TNT block on top. Enter all 5 and they ALL explode at once — massive fireballs, orange screen flash, and GAME OVER!

name: Bennet
description: DONUTS! Glazed donuts with frosting and sprinkles appear every 5 seconds. Eat one: +1 health, grow bigger. Eat four more... DONUT OVERDOSE! Shockwave rings, flying chunks, and you explode.

name: Cyrus and Ezra and Akil
description: The Maker is now Link from Zelda — green hat, blue shield with triforce, silver sword. Portals arm TNT but no longer warp you. Lose your last heart and you EXPLODE in a rainbow burst of 90 particles before Game Over!

name: Rydia and Leo
description: A Febreze ad slides in from the side every 18 seconds — teal panel, product bottle, 'breathe happy.' After 20 seconds: DEATH STAR appears! 300 HP, panel lines, equatorial trench, and a superlaser that charges up and FIRES a green beam across the arena.

name: Jonah
description: Grab the mushroom to become Mario (red cap with M, blue overalls)! Grab the star and enter STAR POWER — wavy rainbow star beams fire in all 8 directions automatically, killing every enemy they touch!

name: Rydia
description: DILLY the pill bug wanders the arena with a little sign on her back! Step on her and the Maker transforms into a big meanie muscle guy — red face, angry scowl, giant flexing biceps, tank top that says MEAN, and +5 bonus hearts.

name: Elle
description: LEADERBOARD on the title and game over screens! Elle is #1 with 1,000,000,000 points. Every kid from the changelog gets a score between 100 and 1000.

name: Hannah
description: Harry Potter flies around on his broomstick — glasses, lightning bolt scar, Gryffindor scarf. Touch him and LOSE a heart. Voldemort floats in dark robes — red eyes, no nose, glowing wand. Touch him and GAIN 2 hearts!

name: Ryan
description: Screen wraps! Exit the right edge and re-enter from the left. Same for top and bottom. Asteroids-style.
